# iproute_sr (Resource)

Manages segment routing configuration (ip sr).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Segment routing with SRv6 segments
resource "iproute_sr" "example" {
  device   = "eth0"
  segments = ["fc00::1", "fc00::2"]
  encap    = "encap"
}

# Inline encapsulation
resource "iproute_sr" "inline" {
  device   = "eth0"
  segments = ["fc00::10"]
  encap    = "inline"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) Interface name.
- `encap` (String) Encap mode (inline, encap).
- `hmac` (String) HMAC key.
- `segments` (List of String) SRv6 segments.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
